verses.text: Shittim-ah Israel mite a om laitakin Moab gam numeite tawh paktat ding kipan uh hi
Hih numeite in amau' pasian biakpiakna pawi-ah Israel mite sam uh a, amaute in a pawi an nekpihin, amau' pasian-te' mai-ah kun uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Peor-a Baal tawh Israel mite va kizomtawm hi. Israel mite tungah Topa heh mahmah a
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel mite' tung panin Topa' hehna a kihtakhuai a bei theihna dingin mite' ukpite khempeuh man in la, Topa' mai-ah suntangin amaute khai in,” a ci hi
Moses in Israel thukhente kiangah, “Note khempeuh in Peor-a Baal tawh a va kizomtawm na mite khempeuh uh na that ciat ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Kikhopna bukkongah amaute kapin a om laitak, Moses' muhna leh Israel mihon buppi' muhna-ah Israel mite khat hong pai-in, Midian numei khat ama innkuanpihte kiangah hong ciahpih hi
Siampi Aaron' tapa Eleazar, Eleazar' tapa Finehas in a muh ciangin dingin mihonte' lak panin paikhia a, a khutah teipi khat tawi-in
Israel mipa inndei sungah zui a, Israel mipa leh a numei, a numei' pumpi pailetin a nihin sun khawm hi. Tua bangin Israel mite' sung panin gimna dai hi
Ahi zongin gimna tawh a si mite tul sawmnih leh tul li ahi hi

“Siampi Aaron' tapa Eleazar, Eleazar' tapa Finehas in Israel mite tungah ka hehna damsak kik hi. Keimah in pammaih ka sak bangin amah in pammaihsa ahih ciangin pammaih ka sakna tawh Israel mite ka beisak kei hi
Tua ahih ciangin, ‘En in, ka thuciam ahi nopsakna, amah ka pia hi

Ama tung leh ama khitah a suanlekhakte tungah tawntung siampi hihna thuciamna hi ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama Pasian-a' ding amah in pammaih sak sak a, Israel mite-a' ding kilemna bawlsak hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Midian numei tawh a kithat khawm, Israel mi a kithatpa' min pen Simeon mite sung panin a beh lutang Salu' tapa Zimri ahi hi
Midian numei a kithatnu' min pen Midian innkuan sungah a beh lutang ahi Zur' tanu Kozbi ahi hi
“Midian mite gimsakgawp in la, amaute vatgawp in

bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a khelpilna uh tawh note hong gimsakgawp uh a, Peor tawh kisai thu leh Peor' hangin gimna ni-in a kithat, amau' sanggamnu, Midian uliante' tanu Kozbi thu-ah note hong khem uh hi,” a ci hi.
